name: AWP | 精英之作
descriptionEn: High risk and high reward, the infamous AWP is recognizable by its signature report and one-shot, one-kill policy. It has been custom painted using a combination of hydrographics and careful stenciling and detailed with heat-transfer decals. Chase Turner was a great man... you have big shoes to fill – The Phoenix and The Initiate, Part 1
descriptionZh: 高风险，高回报，恶名昭彰的 AWP 因其标志性的枪声和一枪一个的准则而为人熟知。 这把武器将花纹和严谨的漏印结合起来，通过热转印贴花加强细节，然后进行了自定义涂装。 蔡斯.特纳曾是个伟大的男人… 你现在可是背负着他那重大的使命啊 –《凤凰与崛起（上）》
